title: palicourea tilaranensis
intro: Palicourea tilaranensis, also known as Tilarán's palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is an evergreen shrub native to Costa Rica and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues due to its flavonoid and alkaloid content. Herbal preparations of Palicourea tilaranensis are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
